title: Job Opening Hotel Manager at Ananda in the Himalayas

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Hotel Manager at Ananda in the Himalayas
jsonLd.description:
We at Ananda in the Himalayas are looking for an experienced Hotel Manager based out of Kanpur. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Ananda in the Himalayas:
Ananda in the Himalayas is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Food Safety

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ananda in the Himalayas!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
